title: kardome_runner per-case BMT metrics (legacy v1 shape)
description: Written next to the per-case user output file (see path rules in runtime.kardome_case_metrics). Produced by kardome_runner in core-main; consumed by bmt-gcloud runtime (kardome_case_metrics, kardome_runparams). Not a Cloud Run orchestration artifact.

schema.description: Schema id. Bump only for breaking or incompatible changes; add a new schema file and coordinate core-main + runtime.

namuh_count.description: Case-level NAMUH-style keyword count (primary scoring counter for default SK config).

hi_namuh_count.description: Same semantic counter as namuh_count for backward compatibility; emit the same value as namuh_count unless a future schema defines a split.

calibration_mode.description: True when calibration KWS path is active; when true, runtime typically treats the active counter as calibration hits instead of NAMUH.
